headline: Date Set For Moody's Earnings Release And Investor Teleconference
summary: NEW YORK, July 08, 2026--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) will release its second quarter 2026 results before the start of NYSE trading on Wednesday, July 22, 2026. A copy of the earnings release and supplemental presentation slides will be posted on Moody's Investor Relations website, ir.moodys.com.

headline: Moody's (MCO) Could Be 6% Overvalued After Russell Value Index Addition
summary: Moody's (MCO) has just been added to several Russell value oriented indices, including the Russell 1000 Value Defensive Index. This inclusion puts the stock on the radar of investors tracking quantitative and benchmark driven portfolios. See our latest analysis for Moody's. Moody's share price has moved higher in recent weeks, with a 7 day share price return of 10.50% and a 30 day return of 10.89%. The 3 year total shareholder return of 51.19% points to stronger gains over a longer...

headline: Franklin Resources, Paymentus, and Moody's Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after President Trump declared the Iran ceasefire "over" and vowed fresh strikes, triggering a broad risk-off move. Diversified financials (asset managers, exchanges, brokerages, and consumer-lending firms) are geared to market levels, transaction activity, and credit conditions, all of which sour when volatility spikes.

headline: Harley-Davidson’s Credit Ratings Get Cut to Junk By S&P
summary: (Bloomberg) -- S&P Global Ratings cut Harley-Davidson Inc.’s credit grades to junk status on Wednesday, citing the company’s strategy to start selling lower-cost motorcycles to boost revenue.
